siteDescription: Board game club and training room - infinity of perspectives. A place where fantasy meets reality in reflections of infinite worlds.
pageDescription: Deskohub - a place for everyone who loves board games, strategic, campaign or party games. Operated by board gamers.

hero.title: Board Game Bar
hero.description: A place for everyone who loves board games. Quiet corners for your favorite social game and the opportunity to learn new games.

about.description: A place for everyone who loves board games, whether strategic, campaign or party games. An ideal space for meeting friends and getting to know new kindred spirits.

features.title: WHY DESKOHUB?
features.subtitle: The ideal space for your gaming experience

feature1.title: 100+ board games
feature1.description: Large selection of board and card games for everyone

feature2.title: Large tables with playmats
feature2.description: Comfortable gaming space for your games

feature3.title: Rules explanation
feature3.description: We'll gladly explain the rules and play with you

feature4.title: Quality lighting
feature4.description: Ideal lighting conditions for gaming experience

metadata.title: Deskohub - Board Game Club & Training Room
metadata.description: A place where fantasy meets reality. Board games, training room and board gamer community in Prague.

palmovcon2026.pageDescription: The second Palmovka board game festival at Deskohub from July 16 to 19, 2026.
palmovcon2026.heroAlt: Palmovcon 2026 festival artwork with the Deskohub logo
palmovcon2026.title: PALMOVCON 2026
palmovcon2026.subtitle: The second Palmovka board game festival.
palmovcon2026.intro: Meet your destined gaming partner. Whether you are a hardcore strategist, a creative geek, or a whole nerdy family, come soak up the summer board game atmosphere. No need to read thick rulebooks, our game guides will teach you everything right at the table.
palmovcon2026.reservationCta: I want to reserve a table
palmovcon2026.entryFeeShort: CZK 50 with bar purchase / CZK 100 without
palmovcon2026.complexGamesDescription: Want to play something heavier? The rules explanation signup will be added soon.
palmovcon2026.scheduleDescription: We are still tuning and expanding the program. Registrations will open gradually.

miniaturePainting.title: Miniature painting workshop
miniaturePainting.description: Want to try painting your own miniature? We will gladly lend you paints and figures, just show up!

witcher.title: Open Witcher play session
witcher.description: A legendary fantasy world on your table. Capacity is limited and advance registration is required.

bloodOnTheClocktower.title: Blood on the Clocktower
bloodOnTheClocktower.description: A brilliant deduction game full of bluffing, deduction, and intrigue.

bazaar.title: Big board game bazaar
bazaar.description: Are your shelves bursting at home? Bring games you no longer play, or come hunt for a new one at a great price.

palmovcon2026.footerTitle: Do not miss any news or upcoming registrations.

reservation.pageDescription: Reserve your table at Deskohub board game bar. Choose your preferred date, time, and table type for the perfect gaming experience.

tableReservation.pageDescription: Reserve your perfect spot at Deskohub. Choose your date, time, and preferences for an unforgettable board game experience.
tableReservation.durationLabel: How long will you be staying?
tableReservation.contactDescription: Your contact details for booking confirmation

tablePreferences.largerTable: We need a larger table for a larger game
tablePreferences.largerTableDescription: Select this if you're planning to play a game that requires more table space
tablePreferences.privateSpace: We need a private space (e.g., DnD session)
tablePreferences.privateSpaceDescription: Select this for private gaming sessions
tablePreferences.privateSpaceDisabled: Private space is only available for groups of 5 or fewer people

tableReservation.gdprConsentLabel: I consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the <gdprLink>Privacy Policy</gdprLink> for the purpose of reservation and event participation, including taking, publishing, and indefinite use of photographs and video recordings for promotional purposes. I understand that I may withdraw this consent at any time and that previously published media will be removed where technically feasible and upon explicit request.

thankYou.title: Reservation Confirmed!
thankYou.confirmation: Great news! Your reservation has been confirmed.
thankYou.nextStepsDescription: We've sent a confirmation email to your address. Please save this information for your records.
thankYou.nextStepsConfirmed: Your table is reserved! Please arrive on time. If you need to make changes, contact us as soon as possible.
thankYou.nextStepsPending: We're reviewing your reservation. You'll receive a confirmation email within 24 hours. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

reservationMetadata.title: Reservation Confirmation | Deskohub
reservationMetadata.description: Thank you for your reservation at Deskohub

training.pageDescription: Rent a room for up to 20 people. Suitable for training, business meetings, workshops or team brainstorming. Just a short walk from Palmovka metro.

hero.title: Rent a room for up to 20 people
hero.subtitle: Training room or meeting room
hero.description: At Deskohub we offer a training room for rent that can also be used for business meetings as a conference room. It is also suitable for workshops or team brainstorming. Located just a short walk from Palmovka metro station, ensuring easy access for all participants.

feature1.title: Fast Internet
feature1.description: Reliable high-speed connection for all participants

feature2.title: Flexible Layout
feature2.description: Up to 4 tables - can be arranged in U-shape or two rows, tables can be removed

feature3.title: Top Technology
feature3.description: Projector, air conditioning, comfortable furniture and plenty of power outlets

catering.title: Catering and Refreshments
catering.description: We offer the option to order catering in the adjacent room. We'll be happy to provide drinks and refreshments.

cta.title: For reservations or more information
cta.description: Feel free to contact us at email: {email} or phone number {phone}. We look forward to your visit and ensuring a perfect experience for you and your guests.

gallery.pageDescription: Explore our modern training room and meeting space at Deskohub
gallery.title: Training Room Gallery
gallery.description: Explore our fully equipped training room with capacity for up to 20 people. Ideal for training sessions, workshops, business meetings, and team brainstorming.

reservation.pageDescription: Book our training room for your corporate event, workshop, or team building activity at Deskohub

trainingReservation.pageDescription: Book our spacious training room for corporate events, workshops, and team building activities. Complete your reservation at Deskohub.

form.title: Reserve Training Room

success.description: We'll send you a confirmation email shortly.

error.description: Please try again later or contact us directly.

contact.pageDescription: Get in touch with Deskohub - board game bar in Prague. Contact information, opening hours, and location.
contact.heroSubtitle: Get in touch with us and book your table for an unforgettable gaming experience
contact.heroTip: Reservations outside official opening hours are possible by arrangement. <link>Contact us!</link>
contact.hoursTooltip: Reservations outside official opening hours are possible by arrangement.
contact.formDescription: Have a question or want to book a table? Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

car.title: By Car:
car.parking: There are blue and purple zones here, but free spots in the area are sometimes available.

menu.pageDescription: Explore our delicious food and drinks menu at Deskohub board game bar. Perfect snacks and beverages for your gaming experience.

reservationSubmitted.title: Reservation Received
reservationSubmitted.message: We've received your reservation request and are reviewing availability. You'll hear from us within 24 hours.

reservationRejected.title: Reservation Could Not Be Confirmed
reservationRejected.message: Unfortunately, we're unable to accommodate your reservation at the requested time. Please try booking a different time slot or contact us for assistance finding an alternative.

consentModal.title: We use cookies
consentModal.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking 'Accept all', you consent to our use of cookies.

usage.title: Cookie Usage
usage.description: We use cookies to ensure the basic functionalities of the website and to enhance your online experience. You can choose for each category to opt-in/out whenever you want.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the proper functioning of the website. Without these cookies, the website would not work properly.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies collect information about how you use our website, such as which pages you visited and which links you clicked on. All of the data is anonymized and cannot be used to identify you.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant and engaging for the individual user.

preferences.title: Preference Cookies
preferences.description: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you have made, such as your language preference.

cookieSettings.title: Cookie Settings
cookieSettings.description: Manage your cookie preferences and control how we use cookies on our website.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant and engaging advertisements.

preferences.title: Preference Cookies
preferences.description: These cookies allow the website to remember your choices (such as language preference) to provide a more personalized experience.

messages.saved: Your cookie preferences have been saved.
messages.error: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.
